title: melampyrum sylvaticum var. intermedium
intro: Melampyrum sylvaticum var. intermedium, also known as spotted fly hater or yellow-wort, is a plant species that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and nausea. The health benefits of Melampyrum sylvaticum var. intermedium include its potential to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and improve respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and should be used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
